description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a pointed nose cone. The aircraft features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, swept-back wings with visible control surfaces, and prominent engine exhausts at the back. The cockpit is enclosed with a transparent canopy, likely accommodating two seats in tandem, and is positioned forward on the fuselage. The landing gear is deployed, with a nose wheel and two main wheels visible. The color scheme includes a combination of light gray, blue, black, and yellow accents, giving it a distinctive and high-visibility appearance.
description: A sleek, modern military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The airplane is painted in light gray, blue, black, and yellow accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin engine exhausts, the symmetry of the vertical stabilizers, and the angular shape of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit canopy, wing structure, and the landing gear from a mirrored perspective of view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, the arrangement of the vertical stabilizers, and the cockpit's position at the front.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem multi-seat configuration and a transparent canopy.
